notes: Complete API catalog from JS bundle analysis + authenticated HTTP capture.
Auth: Firebase Bearer token (JWT from firebase.auth().currentUser.getIdToken())
Firebase project: worldarchitecture-ai (Google Cloud Firestore + Identity Toolkit)

endpoints.name: settings
endpoints.description: LLM provider config, model names, custom key flags

endpoints.name: list_campaigns
endpoints.description: List all campaigns for logged-in user

endpoints.name: get_campaign
endpoints.description: Full campaign detail — includes game_state, story, rewards_box, planning_block

endpoints.name: get_story
endpoints.description: Paginated story entries only (no game state)

endpoints.name: export_campaign
endpoints.description: Full campaign export as formatted God Mode text

endpoints.name: send_interaction
endpoints.description: Send player action (non-streaming, returns full result)
endpoints.curl:
curl -s -X POST 'https://mvp-site-app-dev-i6xf2p72ka-uc.a.run.app/api/campaigns/cntvDfj7cGUhUFkxcmV3/interaction' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"user_input":"I attack the goblin with my sword","mode":"god","stream":false}'

endpoints.name: stream_interaction
endpoints.description: Send player action with SSE streaming response
endpoints.response: SSE stream of delta story entries
endpoints.curl:
curl -s -N -X POST 'https://mvp-site-app-dev-i6xf2p72ka-uc.a.run.app/api/campaigns/cntvDfj7cGUhUFkxcmV3/interaction?stream=true' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"user_input":"I attack the goblin","mode":"god"}'

notes_on_firebase: Game state also flows over Firebase Firestore WebSocket (real-time, not HTTP).
Firestore traffic is NOT captured by HTTP interceptors.
To capture Firestore: eval in browser -> firebase.firestore().collection('campaigns').doc(id)
